description: After handling a recurring question multiple times, a support agent decides to create a knowledge base article to enable self-service.

nodes.task_description: Identify a common, recurring customer question that is not yet documented.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that many users ask how to set up two-factor authentication.

nodes.task_description: Write a clear, step-by-step guide with screenshots explaining how to set up 2FA.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent drafts a high-quality help article.

nodes.task_description: Publish the article to the public knowledge base and add relevant keywords for searchability.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully publishes the article, making it available to all users.
